programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: LMN provides drama movies, thrillers, and suspense-filled stories focused on relationships, crime, and real-life inspired events.

programme.title: Wendy Williams: The Movie
programme.desc: (MA) From being a radio jockey to a popular television personality, Wendy Williams battles addiction, infidelity and other challenges in her journey towards success.

programme.title: Taken In Montana
programme.desc: (M) When her parents go missing during a family vacation, a teen tries to put the clues together to find them -- but she may be trusting the wrong people for help.

programme.title: Your Boyfriend Is Mine
programme.desc: LMN provides drama movies, thrillers, and suspense-filled stories focused on relationships, crime, and real-life inspired events.
